title: Create: New Age - Refrubished
description: a new way of imagining the textures of create new age
body:
![project title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/518817705d44dc7281a280e333559859071690af.png)

![screenshot related to textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7fa02e75120e1b2ca943e780a3d6a17d70b696d.png)

**Create New Age** is one of the most brilliant Create mod addons ever made! Its features that combine electricity and SU are very well done, but some players don't give the mod due attention due to its appearance, which is a shame

So, I decided to create this resource pack, which brings a more attractive look to the mod. Several textures were inspired by mod create, so they are consistent with the art style

## About
- [**Original Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
- [**My Social Media**](https://linktr.ee/bl4ck_)
- Free for use in modpacks.
